title: Multipasta
description: Pack that revolves around urban legends, web series & other Internet folklore
body:
ㅤ ## - A Resourse Pack for Minecraft Java Edition.
--- ㅤㅤㅤ
ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
ㅤ ㅤ ### How does the renaming system work? / Как работает система переименований? |**Внутри пака есть два .txt файла на двух разных языках, в которых написаны все переименования предметов, мобов, шляп и прочего. Ниже краткий туториал о том, как получить ту или иную вещь. Также, чтобы получить какого-то моба, вам нужно сначала переименовать для него бирку или его яйцо призыва.** |:---:| |**Inside the pack there are two .txt files in two different languages, in which all renames for items, mobs, hats and etc. are written. Below is a short tutorial on how to get something. Also, to get some kind of mob, you need to first rename its name tag or spawn egg.**
--- ㅤ ## Celestial Events / Небесные события
ㅤ ㅤ # Additional Links ## What you need for Multipasta to work |
It is recommended to download ETF & EMF also with ESF so that new mobs that mp adds have their own custom sounds. If playing with this at Fabric then also need to download Animatica and Cit Resewn (If lower than 1.21) for custom animations entities and items renaming to work, as well as Skyboxify for sky events....Or only OptiFine if you don't want to hear the sounds, ambients, etc. of new mobs. |:---:| ㅤ ㅤㅤ ㅤ |If you have any questions or ideas, or are simply interested in mpasta, we have a community [Discord server](https://discord.gg/34uHCQhhx3) that you can join. And there is also an **unofficial** wiki fandom (it says about every-everything that is in mp) so far, there is only a Russian language Wiki. English domain, may God, someday someone will create... |:---:| ㅤㅤㅤ ㅤㅤ ㅤ ______________________________________________________________________________
ㅤ # Credits
Main Cast * [Kotisimo](https://x.com/kotisimo_) [](https://x.com/kotisimo_) (Owner/Director/Creator, also coder & animator) * [Poolb](https://modrinth.com/user/Poolb) [](https://modrinth.com/user/Poolb) (Artist & Co-director) * [PixalThePixeled](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/pixalthepixeled/) [](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/pixalthepixeled/) (Artist, also coder & animator) * [Moro2610](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/moro2610/) [](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/moro2610/) (Artist) * [Primal](https://x.com/Primalishe) [](https://x.com/Primalishe) (Artist) * [MrMirajlzHere](https://mirajspalace.space/) [](https://mirajspalace.space/) (Composer, also helped with sounds/ambients for some mobs) * [Shitov](https://t.me/shitov_otstoi) [](https://t.me/shitov_otstoi) (Artist)
They Helped (Misc) * [Raltu](https://x.com/RalTwitt) [](https://x.com/RalTwitt)(Artist) * [Bogdanov](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/bogdanov/) [](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/bogdanov/)(Help with code & animations) * [Sp0ty](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/sp0ty/) [](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/sp0ty/)(Artist, previously an) * [K0n4ik](https://t.me/realno_konchik) [](https://t.me/realno_konchik)(Artist & Help with some renders and early banners)
Special Thanks❤️ * [RiN](https://m.vk.com/rinchik71) [](https://m.vk.com/rinchik71) (Drew arts and early covers/banners, as well as some paintings) * [Queen Kami](https://www.deviantart.com/queenkami) [](https://www.deviantart.com/queenkami) (Creator of the original White Hand & Buried Alive sprites, drew a painting and helped clarify the canon regarding some things) * [Duhclasp](https://www.youtube.com/@clasp34) [](https://www.youtube.com/@clasp34) (Help with creating models of items such as Hell Bell, Gold, and early Feraligatr) * [MAYAK](https://ghworlds.com/) [](https://ghworlds.com/) (Created the original early 1.21.8 Adaptation, which inspired me nd others to create own adaptation of the pack for the latest versions)
ㅤ ## Not the main part of the description (Other) AKA Multipasta lore There are various things that a significant part of the pack is dedicated to, and that I would still like to talk about here as well, for example the original sources, the ideas, and their interpretations. I think this is something like a spoiler, since more is shown here than in the main part of the description or in the gallery, so each of the "chapters", if you can call them that, will be marked as a spoiler.
NES Godzilla CreepyPasta, and similar not Creepy & not Pasta ㅤ NES Godzilla, its not really necessary to know [the original source](https://allone-works.com/ngc/index.php/category/ngc/) very well, or even to understand Godzilla in general to get what it is, kaiju simply fight each other, which is literally the point of the game. It is essentially an urban legend (or a haunted hack of an old cartridge, if you prefer), which is why it got a place in the front rows of Multipasta. I like the idea of dividing the content based on it into planets, and so far three planets have been interpreted in the pack, Earth&Mars (counted as one), Pathos, and Trance.
ㅤ From the entire abundance of content in the original (both the game and the story), it's obvious that the pack will not include all of it. The reason for this is that mpasta isn't really about Godzilla, even though it is present in it. So, how will this content be added: first comes the main content, the things that absolutely need to be added. By main content I mean playable monsters (Godzilla, Mothra, Anguirus, etc) and the main bosses of each planet, for example Not Varan, Not Hedorah, and Orga from Trance. Next comes the not main content. By this I mean mini bosses and background enemies from the levels, such as Horse Bat, Weeper, or Varan. It's unlikely that all of the non main stuff will make it into the pack, usually from it I try to add only those bg enemies/npcs, etc, that appeared more often than the others, or that have an interesting design and unique features. Since some bg enemies in the original game could appear on different planets while having different colors or slightly altered designs, I decided to implement these variations not as separate mobs, hats, etc. each time, but as color variations/variants of the same mob. An example of this is Matango and its spawn, they appeared on almost all of the early planets but looked slightly different, so it makes sense that in Multipasta they won't be separate mobs each time, but the same creature with different color variations depending on the Mars, Pathos, and so on. ㅤ
ㅤ
Pokepasta and How It Turns ㅤ Content that is in any way related to Pokemon is usually based on Pokepastas, urban legends, glitches from the original games, well-known hoaxes, and so on. Examples of things based on a story or an urban legend include DISABLED, Hell Bell, the Lavender Town Ghost (based on the syndrome associated with that town), and similar cases. Then, examples of glitches include MissingNo, 44Hy, Bad Egg, etc. And examples of things that take their original roots from hacks or hoaxes include Haunted Jigglypuff, some content related to Lost Silver, Buried Alive & White Hand, or Pikachu Mt. Silver (yes, I still consider this more of a hack or something along those lines since it is playable; by the way, I classify Lost Silver stuff under this same category for the same reason).
ㅤ This attempt to divide everything into something like "categories" may not be perfect (there are contradictions and some inconsistencies in it), but I still personally like it, and for the reader it will most likely bring more clarity to whats going on than they had initially. Which pokepasta stories and similar content will get their adaptation in Multipasta? Most likely those that: A - are well written or well made (in the case of hacks), B - have good or interesting creature designs, C - not necessarily, but still, have some kind of story behind them or have left a mark on pop culture (for example, the Lavender Town Syndrome). At the same time, it's unlikely that absolutely all stories that meet these criteria will receive an interpretation in the pack, since, again, it is far from being only about this part of the media, even though it is present in it. In the resource pack, the following will 100% receive their well-deserved place and adaptation [Unown King](https://pokepasta.fandom.com/wiki/Curse_of_the_Unown_King), Charon from [Call of Charon](https://pokepasta.fandom.com/wiki/Call_Of_Charon), Charizard Miki from Strangled Red. Also possibly [Bound To Cheat](https://www.tumblr.com/pokemoncreepypasta/662883638225027072/bound-to-cheat), Darkrai, [Tommy Boy](https://www.tumblr.com/pokemoncreepypasta/661702185119350784/tommy-boy), and [Pikablu](https://gaming-urban-legends.fandom.com/wiki/Pikablu). Unown King will become the final entry in this series and will close the Pokemon-related theme in mpasta forever, meaning that after it there will be no more updates related to it. ㅤ
ㅤ
Something else about Celestial Events ㅤ I already explained this in detail above and how it works, so I don’t think it's necessary to repeat here what it is. So, celestial events are divided by me into astronomical, paranormal/mystical, and simply creatures. Astronomical ones are various moons, planets, and other celestial bodies that can rise in your sky. Paranormal/Mystical ones are all kinds of unnatural phenomena, that is, various UFOs, spiritual entities like angels and similar things, dreamcore anomalies, etc. Creatures are, quite literally creatures, for example, sky jellyfish, various atmospheric animals, and so on.
ㅤ So, what should be expected from this in the future, and how are celestial events chosen to be added into Multipasta? Some are completely original and are created by me, that is, the author of this resource pack (and not only me), while others are based on something a bit more real, such as the [Washington flap](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/1952_Washington,_D.C._UFO_incident) or that old photos with a giant jellyfish in the sky. Also, many moons/planets, actually, I would say most of them, take their original source from the planets in NES Godzilla, which I mentioned a bit earlier. Most likely, all new celestial events will be added to the pack following the same approach as before: some will be references, some will be original, and some will come from some kind of cursed, God forgotten NES cartridge game. As for what will 100% be in mpasta, I can confidently say that in the near future there are plans to add the planet Iris from Gemini Home Entertainment, as well as possibly its moons. ㅤ
ㅤ
